response.justification: Candidate is a solid full-stack software craftsman with ~16 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but the role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy leadership. The resume shows individual contributor work at senior/staff level without strategic leadership scope, no advanced AI degree, and only brief, recent AI-adjacent work — insufficient signal for a Principal/Director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: ~16 years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic frameworks
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform — demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at the scale a Principal AI strategy role requires
Career trajectory is senior/staff IC — no evidence of director-level influence, advising strategic customers, or shaping cloud product future state
Limited deep cloud-platform credentials (AWS CDK mentioned, but no architect-level cloud or ML platform record); no Master's/PhD in AI

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI products
IC scope below Director/Principal strategy level
15+ years engineering breadth with recent AI-agent/MCP exposure
